tracks.meaning: A distinct area or region with particular characteristics, boundaries, or purpose
A marked area or section of a playing field or court designated for specific play
An area of the body or skin characterized by a particular condition or sensitivity
A region of the body affected by injury, disease, or medical treatment
An area of land designated for military operations or defense
A district under the jurisdiction of a particular authority or administration
A defined region or division of the celestial sphere or space
A region of Earth where a standard time is observed
To divide or partition an area into distinct zones
A designated area or partition within a storage system or memory
A geographic area designated for particular commercial or industrial activities
A state of focused concentration or optimal performance in an activity
To enter a state of reduced awareness or daydreaming
A defined section or compartment used for organizing stored items
A region characterized by particular climatic or atmospheric conditions
